description: A shell script performing end-to-end smoke testing of an orchestration API, including document creation, text attachment, orchestration run, build status polling, and result fetching.

methods.name: have_jq
methods.description: Checks if 'jq' command-line JSON processor is available.

methods.name: require_cmd
methods.description: Ensures a required command is available, exits if not.

methods.name: c
methods.description: Wrapper around 'curl' with default headers for JSON content.

methods.name: json_get
methods.description: Extracts a value from JSON using 'jq' or a fallback Python parser.
